---
title: "experiments"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(logolink)
```

```{r}
model_path <- file.path("netlogo", "roads", "Segregation Utility.nlogox")
model_path <- "C:/Users/vsesu60/OneDrive - Linköpings universitet/Documents/R/vis-soc/netlogo/roads/Segregation Utility.nlogox"
```

```{r}
setup_file <- create_experiment(
  name = "Venue Segragation Model Analysis",
  repetitions = 1,
  run_metrics_every_step = TRUE,
  setup = "setup",
  go = "go",
  time_limit = 300,
  metrics = c(
  'index-exposure',
  'index-dissimilarity',
  'index-clustering',
  'index-centrality',
  'index-concentration'
  ),
  constants = list(
    "density-percent" = c(70),
    "%-similar-wanted" = 30,
    "number-of-ethnicities" = 2,
    "%-different-wanted" = 0,
    "neighborhood-distance" = 2,
    "venues-number" = 4,
    "venue-catchment-distance" = 10,
    "venue-exclusivity" = 1,
    "utility-threshold" = 0.1,
    "beta1-neighbors" = c(0, 0.1, 0.5, 1),
    "beta2-venue-group" = 0.5,
    "beta3-venue-loc" = 0,
    "beta4-home-venues" = 0,
    "road-scenario" = 'empty',
    "parks-number" = 3,
    "park-catchment-distance" = 2,
    "beta5-park-group" = 0.25,
    "travel-distance" = 5,
    "road-multiplier" = 1,
    "real-travel?" = F,
    "random-seed?" = F
  )
)


```

```{r}
setup_file |> inspect_experiment()
```


```{r}
results <-
  model_path |>
  run_experiment(
    setup_file = setup_file,
    output = "table"
  )
```

```{r}
results |> glimpse()
```

```{r}
library(magrittr)
data <-
  results |>
  extract2("table") 
```


```{r}
data |> 
  filter(step <= 100) |> 
  select(
    run_number,
    step,
    starts_with("index_"),
    beta1_neighbors         
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("index_"),
    names_to = "index",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = step, y = value, color = index)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ beta1_neighbors ) +
  labs(title = "Segregation Indices Over Time", x = "Step", 
       y = "Index Value", color = "Index") +
  theme_minimal()
       
```
